title: monelasmum monticola
intro: Monelasmum monticola is a plant species that belongs to the family Rubiaceae, commonly known as the coffee or madder family. It is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating digestive issues. Monelasmum monticola is typically prepared as a herbal tea or infusion, and in some cases, it is also used in combination with other herbs to create a medicinal preparation.
